text: 4214 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنِ اُضْطُرَّ إِلَى اَلْمَيْتَةِ وَ اَلدَّمِ وَ لَحْمِ اَلْخِنْزِيرِ فَلَمْ يَأْكُلْ شَيْئاً مِنْ ذَلِكَ حَتَّى يَمُوتَ فَهُوَ كَافِرٌ"

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4214 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever is compelled by necessity to eat from a dead animal, blood, or the flesh of a pig, yet refrains from eating any of it until he dies, then he is considered a disbeliever."
